summary: Trim whitespace from each vehicle-model string in the flattened quote response (new trimModels helper applied where quotePackage is built).
reason: The upstream /prices 'models' array carries leading spaces (e.g. ' BMW 5 Series'), which surfaced as ugly leading-space entries in quote/fit/compare/trip output.
validated_outcome: Output review (Phase 4.85) format-bugs finding cleared; model lists render without leading spaces.
